assertions.evidence: Dedicated sections for D-7, D-6, D-5, D-4, D-3, D-2, D-1, D0 with specific content for each day. More granular than with_skill (8 days vs 5).
LinkedIn uses long-form narratives, Twitter uses shorter tweets/hilos. Format and tone differ per platform.

D-7 LinkedIn starts with 'Pasé 3 años viendo cómo equipos enteros perdían el 40% de su tiempo' — number hook (40%). D-7 Twitter: 'Los equipos no fallan por falta de esfuerzo. Fallan porque...' — contradiction hook. Both identifiable.
No mention of Open Graph image, opengraph-image.tsx, ImageResponse, or next/og. The campaign plan doesn't address how the launch link preview looks on social media.
